title: Artificial Tropical Palm Leaf Bushes Faux Green Fronds Plant in Plastic Areca Palm Plant 15 Leaves Palm Tree 63 cm Tall for Tropical Greenery Accent Floral Arrangement Home Wedding Decor
features: 【Party & Home Decorations】These faux palm leaves can create an authentic tropical island atmosphere. Perfect for Luau Parties, Tropical Hawaiian, Safari Party, Beach Theme, Wedding, Birthday, Jungle Theme, TiKi Parties.

【Material】Plastic and iron wire.Non-toxic and eco-friendly, durable and reusable.This artificial tropical plant simulates the natural shape of the real leaves. Bring your space to life with the Tropical Palm Leaves. These leaves can be used to create a realistic foliage look. The Artificial Tropical Leaves can bring tropical flavor to the table. Perfect to a tropical theme.

【Flexible Stem】There is iron wire inside the stem, you can bend the stem to fit your vase or adjust the shape make it looks more real. In order to facilitate transportation, the stems will be bent to a certain degree. The prototype can be manually adjusted when you receive the Leaf.You can restore them to straight easily or any shape as you want.

【Nature Leaf Design】The surface of the artificial Jungle leaves is glossy and the veins are clearly printed, make your home more natural, tropical and vibrant.Artificial Tropical Palm Plant is about 63 cm in Tall（as shown in the figure）.
【Package Include】1 x Green Artificial Palm Plant (15 Leaves, Imitation Boston Fern Plant Leaf Bushes ).
description: Product Description AIVORIUY & Artificial Tropical Palm Plant Green artificial tropical palm leaf bush perfect for wedding suppliers Palm leaves can be used as the perfect decoration for a wedding. Full of green wedding scenes, just like in a real tropical island! Warm Note: There is iron wire inside the stem, you can bend the stem to fit your vase or adjust the shape make it looks more real. In order to facilitate transportation, the stems will be bent to a certain degree. The prototype can be manually adjusted when you receive the Leaf. Beautiful, Vivid and Lifelike Specification: Material:The Tropical Palm Leaf is made of Plastic,the stem is polyester over a wire center,which makes the stem easy to shape as you wish,will be a good choice for DIY décor. Color: Green. Package includes:1 x Green Artificial Palm Plant (15 Leaves) Wide Application: Can be applied to decorate dinning table or stick to the wall as wall decor, assemble the stemmed leaves into vases. Create an authentic tropical island atmosphere, make you and your guests feel like you are in paradise with these super realistic simulation leaves. Beautiful, vivid and lifelike，simply use in individual decoration. Bringing nature beauty into your house. Party decor，create an authentic tropical island atmosphere. Table decor,decor your table by these artificial palm leaves, create sensational tropical atmosphere. Home decor,great decors for home, adding tropical lookings!
